task.en: Set up TWO Hot Corners in System Settings → Desktop & Dock → Hot Corners… (the button is near the bottom of the pane): (a) the bottom-right corner should `Start Screen Saver`; (b) the top-right corner should `Lock Screen`. Click Done to save.

pre_command: defaults write com.apple.dock wvous-br-corner -int 1 2>/dev/null; defaults write com.apple.dock wvous-tr-corner -int 1 2>/dev/null; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; killall Dock 2>/dev/null; sleep 2
grading_command: killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; BR=$(defaults read com.apple.dock wvous-br-corner 2>/dev/null); [ "$BR" = "5" ] && echo True || echo False
killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; TR=$(defaults read com.apple.dock wvous-tr-corner 2>/dev/null); [ "$TR" = "13" ] && echo True || echo False
